title: Unblock Stuck Memories: - Relax: Take Deep Breaths and Stop Stressing over the Word
subtitle: Clear the ‘Tip of the Tongue’ Block
description:
To unblock stuck memories:
- Relax: Take deep breaths and stop stressing over the word or idea.
- Use hints: Think of related words, phrases, or contexts.
- Distract yourself: Do something else for a while; it often pops up later.

Example: If you can’t recall a name, focus on where you met the person or other details about them.
keywords: Clear the ‘Tip of the Tongue’ Block
